title: Add warning if unpacked array bound positive index is converted to negative

features.name: unpacked array with lower bound at signed 32-bit boundary
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declared with a lower bound at exactly 32'h8000_0000 (2^31), which is the signed 32-bit integer boundary

features.name: array index at signed integer overflow boundary
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array access where the computed index equals or exceeds 32'h8000_0000, causing signed integer overflow
